name: get_parts
short_description: Get a list of parts available in the software
full_help:
get_parts

Description: 
Get a list of parts available in the software

Syntax: 
get_parts  [-regexp] [-filter <arg>] [-of_objects <args>] [-quiet] [-verbose]
           [<patterns>]

Returns: 
list of part objects

Usage: 
  Name           Description
  --------------------------
  [-regexp]      Patterns are full regular expressions
  [-filter]      Filter list with expression
  [-of_objects]  Get the parts of the objects specified: project, design, or 
                 run.
  [-quiet]       Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]     Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<patterns>]   Match part names against patterns
                 Default: *
                 Values: The default search pattern is the wildcard *, or .* 
                 when -regexp is specified.

Categories: 
Object

arguments.description: Get the parts of the objects specified: project, design, or run.
Suspend message limits during command execution
